$comment: Codex CLI hook config. Loaded automatically when the project root contains .codex/hooks.json (codex-cli >= 0.121). For earlier codex-cli, copy this content into ~/.codex/hooks.json or reference these paths from a Codex plugin manifest. Hook event names and the wire shape (`hookEventName`, `additionalContext`, `hookSpecificOutput`) are identical to Claude Code's. Confirmed against codex-cli@0.121.0 binary string types.
